release.change: 🔧 Fixed custom sounds not showing up in UI (they were being ghosted fr fr)
📱 Settings page no longer gets yeeted to the bottom after rotating screen
✨ Made changelog popup way less chonky (no more full screen stretch)
📱 New bottom navigation with dedicated custom sounds section
👆 Swipe to remove items from the queue
🐸 App did Magerquark diet, lost some weight (voice files download on demand)
